targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, payload->>'zone' AS zone, payload->>'sensor_id' AS sensor, payload->>'alert_type' AS alert_type, payload->>'value' AS value FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE (payload->>'alert')::text = 'true' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 500
SELECT payload->>'zone' AS zone, count(*) AS cnt FROM urbanpulse_history WHERE (payload->>'alert')::text = 'true' AND ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC
